metadata.name: Homer
metadata.description: Simple static homepage for your server to keep your services on hand, configured through a single YAML file.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Simple static homepage for your server to keep your services on hand, configured through a single YAML file.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; optional; default: homer.
- `container_name`: Name to use for the container; optional; default: homer.
- `container_timezone`: Timezone used inside the container; optional.
- `restart_policy`: Policy used for Restart; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.
- `homer_title`: Value used for the general settings; optional; default: Dashboard.
- `homer_subtitle`: Value used for the general settings; optional; default: Dashboard.
- `homer_logo`: Logo file path (relative to assets/); optional; default: logo-file.png.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port for HTTP (8080); optional; default: 8080.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_entrypoint`: Entrypoint name; required; default: web.
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_entrypoint`: Entrypoint name; required; default: websecure; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

### Authentik SSO
- `authentik_traefik_middleware`: Middleware name; required; default: middleware@file; shown when: traefik_enabled=true.
- `authentik_client_id`: Identifier for the client; optional; default: .
- `authentik_client_secret`: Secret value for the client; optional; default: .
- `authentik_enabled`: Enable Authentik SSO integration; optional; default: false.
- `authentik_slug`: The Authentik application slug; optional; default: .
- `authentik_url`: URL used for The Authentik; optional; default: .

## References
- [GitHub](https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer)
- [Configuration Guide](https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer/blob/main/docs/configuration.md)

## Next Steps
1. Start the Homer dashboard:
   docker compose up -d

2. Customize your dashboard:
   - Edit assets/config.yml to add your services
   - Organize services into groups (Applications, Monitoring, etc.)
   - Add links to the navbar for quick access

3. Optional: Add a logo:
   - Place your logo.png file in the assets/ directory
   - Or update the logo path in assets/config.yml
   - Supported formats: PNG, SVG, JPG

4. Optional: Customize the theme:
   - Uncomment and modify the colors section in config.yml
   - Available themes: default, sui
   - See documentation for advanced theming options

5. Access your dashboard:
   <% if traefik_enabled -%>
   - Via Traefik: https://<< traefik_host >>
   <% if not traefik_enabled and network_mode == 'bridge' %>- Direct access: http://localhost:<< ports_http >><% endif %>
   <%- else -%>
   - Open http://localhost:<< ports_http >> in your browser
   <%- endif %>

For more information, visit: https://github.com/bastienwirtz/homer/blob/main/docs/configuration.md
